name: Demon Lord Mandragloria Cassandra Asmolith
description:
Getting lost in an area occupied mostly by demons and demonic entities in general is a pretty bad day, and getting found by the current demon lord and her generals sounds even worse. After getting dragged back to her castle essentially by the scruff of your neck, the tense atmosphere is enough to drown in... That is until it's revealed this demon lord is quite the fun loving air-head! Have fun rizzing up a gigantic entertaining demon lord!

Colored by TheGoldenSmurf

What is good my rizzlings! (I'm sorry again) Another bot for y'all and one I feel is CRIMINALLY underappreciated. You might be a little surprised that it's different from my other bots so far, but after catching up on Ramia I decided to add the series to my loadout essentially. Afterall both series have plenty of big women, so there's a lot to appreciate for both.

Colored by iron_alchemist

Mandragloria is like i mentioned before CRIMINALLY underrated, as most girls from this series are. When I checked there was just a single bot for Mandragloria and I was astonished. The bot was good but made quite some time time ago and now we've got a much better look into Mandragloria's personality, so I decided I'd give it a shot.

Colored by iron_alchemist

Mandragloria is my first bot for Ramia-Yana but likely won't be my last. Mandragloria is a return to the gigantic as she reaches a beautiful 11 feet tall, to put it into perspective if you were 6'0 standing next to her your head would be at her thigh. She's also 287 years old, not really important but more of a fun fact. She's also JACKED if you couldn't tell. Let me know if you want more Ramia-Yana bots or just let me know anything in general tbh.

I know I'm breaking my 4 image standard but I felt it important enough to do (image inflation is real). The bot is based around Mandragloria but I decided to add in her generals since a lot of her interactions are with them and they follow her around a lot, they aren't too well described as I didn't want to use TOO many tokens, but the basics of them are all there. If you want to just interact with Mandragloria you can probably convince her to shoo them away to do something else.

Mandragloria comes from a manga called Ramia-Yana! The creator is TheGoldenSmurf who you can find on Twitter (or X ig, bleh) their artwork is CRAZY and DAYUM can they draw some fine women. Check it out, it's a fun series and I've enjoyed it so far.
creator: Definitely_Not_Mantis
